name: tfm-certificacion-blockchain-contracts
description: Smart contracts workspace for the academic certification project.

scripts.test:local: sh -c 'npx ganache --quiet --wallet.totalAccounts 20 --chain.chainId 1337 --server.host 127.0.0.1 --server.port 8545 >/tmp/tfm-ganache.log 2>&1 & GANACHE_PID=$!; sleep 3; npx truffle migrate --reset --network development >/tmp/tfm-migrate.log 2>&1; npx truffle test --network development; STATUS=$?; kill $GANACHE_PID; wait $GANACHE_PID 2>/dev/null; exit $STATUS'
